OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Creates an individual application and a claim when an employee files a workers' compensation claim.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreateIndividualApplicationAndClaim

omniProcessElements.name: CreateClaimEmployee
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "=%User:AccountId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsCreateClaim", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: PSSGetPersonAccountIDOfApplicant
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "userId" : "=%userId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsGetPersonAccountIDOfApplicant", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "User", "responseJSONPath" : "User", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: PSSSCreateIndividualApplicationEmployee
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "%User:AccountId%", "ApplicationType" : "Filed Claim", "DRId_Claim" : "%CreateClaimEmployee:Claim_1:Id%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsCreateIndividualApplication", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: Save-Responses
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "remoteClass" : "omnistudio.StoreResponses", "remoteMethod" : "invokeMethod", "remoteOptions" : { "Assessment.AssessmentStatus" : "Completed", "Assessment.Name" : "%SetAssessmentName:AssessmentName%", "Assessment.ResponseContextId" : "%PSSSCreateIndividualApplicationEmployee:IndividualApplication_1:Id%" }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
